articles.title: Is Elon Musk Losing His Edge? Tweets Fail To Move DOGE Prices
articles.description: For the first time, it seems Elon Musk’s tweets have no effect on Doge. The billionaire had tweeted earlier about doge but this time, there was no reaction from the coin. In fact, the coin is down 2% since the tweet went live. Musk is notoriously known for pushing the price of Doge with his […]

articles.title: What Is Baby Doge and Why Is Elon Musk Pumping the Dogecoin Knockoff?
articles.description: Dogecoin and Shiba Inu have a new doge rival competing for Elon Musk's love.

articles.title: VeChain Announces The World’s First National eNFT Adoption, Why It Could Be Huge for VET
articles.description: The VeChain Foundation and DNV Assurance have partnered with the Republic of San Marino to issue Digital COVID-19 vaccination certificates. Approved via a law on June 16th, this solution will provide its citizens with a digital certificate “in line with the European Union standards”. The certificates will be issued via Enterprise Non-Fungible Tokens (eNFTs), a […]

articles.title: Balancer Launches on Polygon to Reduce Gas Fees
articles.description: Striving to reduce gas fees for its users, Balancer Protocol has announced the launch of its network on top of the Layer 2 solution - Polygon.

articles.title: Cardano ($ADA) Launches on the Nexo Platform
articles.description: On Wednesday (June 30), the Cardano Community finally got the news that it had impatiently been waiting for: Cardano ($ADA) has been integrated with the financial services of crypto startup Nexo, which is one of the largest providers of crypto-backed loans. Nexo lets you: buy crypto using fiat currency (USD, EUR, or GBP) earn interest […]

articles.title: SBI, Hamamatsu Iwata Bank pick Ripple’s tech for international remittance
articles.description: The evolution of the banking system has already begun. With the rise in demand for real-time, low-cost cross-border payments, integration of the traditional banking landscape with blockchain firms like Ripple makes even more sense.
